title_en: 【大井競馬・帝王賞】ミッキーファイト 圧巻V 史上2頭目の連覇
description: 上半期のダート最強馬を決するJpn1「第49回帝王賞」が1日、大井競馬場で行われ、単勝1・7倍の圧倒的1番人気に支持されたJRA所属ミッキーファイトが貫禄の押し切りV。22、23年メイショウハリオ以来、史上2頭目の同レース連覇を達成した。JRA所属馬は11年から帝王賞16連勝。鞍上の戸崎圭太(45)は10年フリオーソ以来3勝目、管理する田中博康師(40)は2年連続2度目の制覇となった。 力強く、そして堂々と駆け抜けた。22、23年メ...

title_en: 今週は北の大地でユタカVSスーパーユタカが熱い! 通算5000勝へあと4のレジェンド「向こうはスーパーがついていますから(笑)」7月5日の函館5R・2歳新馬戦
description: 今週はユタカVSスーパーユタカが熱い！ 5日の函館5R・2歳新馬(芝1800メートル)には、武豊騎手(57)＝栗東・フリー＝騎乗の素質馬ダノンキューブと、早くも4頭が勝ち上がった新種牡馬エフフォーリア産駒のスーパーユタカが出走を予定している。通算5000勝まで残り4勝のレジェンドは「向こうはスーパーがついていますから(笑)」と絶口調。“ライバル”撃破へ意欲をのぞかせた。 北の大地で“ユタカ対決”が実現しそうだ?..

title_en: 【帝王賞】2着アウトレンジ またしても銀メダル 松山は「いいリズムで運ぶことができた」
description: 2年連続参戦のアウトレンジはまたしても銀メダルに終わった。道中は5、6番手で脚をためながらミッキーファイトをマーク。直線は昨年同様、外から勝ち馬を捉えにかかった。 だが、その差を縮めることはできず、1馬身3/4差の2着。松山は「枠が良くて、相手を見ながら、いいリズムで運ぶことができた。最後もしっかり伸びてくれた」と愛馬を称えた。

title_en: 【帝王賞】3着ディクテオン 衰え知らずの8歳 矢野「流れが向けば勝ててもよかった」
description: 地元のディクテオンは大外からメンバー最速の上がり3F36秒7の末脚で迫ったが、勝ち馬から0秒3差の3着。昨年の東京大賞典以来となる勝利を飾ることはできなかった。 それでも矢野は「いい競馬だった。最後は素晴らしい脚で、この馬らしい競馬ができた。流れが向けば勝ててもよかった」と衰え知らずの8歳馬を改めて評価した。

description: ▼4着セラフィックコール(吉原寛)4コーナーは夢をみた。直線は何とかもうひと伸びと思ったが…。これからまだまだ良くなると思う。 ▼5着ラムジェット(三浦)ここに目標が切り替わって急ピッチで立て直されてきた中で、心身共に成長がうかがえた。最後はきつくなってしまったが、先々が楽しみになる一戦だった。 ▼6着ロードクロンヌ(横山和)先生と組み立てた内容では走ってくれた。3コーナーくらいから苦しくなるところ...

description: 3歳馬デアヴェローチェは開門直後、初コンタクトの川田を背に坂路へ。直線で軽く気合をつけられると僚馬の内からグンと加速。最後は手綱を持ったまま併入して4F54秒1〜1F12秒4。上村師は「ジョッキーに感触を確かめてもらった。長距離輸送が初めてだし、時計を求めず調整したが、動きは良かった」と及第点を与えた。 「まだ緩さを残していて、良くなる余地がある中で結果を残せているのはセンスの高さ。初めて古馬が相手。...

title_en: 【北九州記念】追ってひと言
description: ▼アブキールベイ(三津谷助手)緩めさせるより負荷をかけて動きを確認。一戦ごとに成長して馬体重も安定してきました。 ▼アメリカンビキニ(斉藤崇師)骨折明けですが戻ってきて順調。ハンデ(51キロ)が軽いのでチャレンジ。 ▼アンクルクロス(喜多助手)追い切りはいい意味で前走並み。もう一段階(上が)あるけど、気持ち余裕を残しての調整。 ▼イツモニコニコ(浜田師)馬なりで予定通り。相手が強くなるので、どこまで?..

title_en: 【ジュライS】メリークリスマス 破格の猛時計をマーク 小手川師「予定通り」
description: 重賞初挑戦だった前走の平安Sで4着に善戦したメリークリスマス(牡4＝小手川)がさらに調子を上げている。 1週前の6月24日にWコースで6F76秒6という破格の猛時計をマーク。最終追いは同コースで馬なり(5F67秒1〜1F12秒0)と軽めだったが、動きには躍動感があふれている。小手川師も「先週しっかり負荷をかけており、輸送もあるので余裕残し。予定通りです」と順調さをアピール。オープン特別なら好勝負は必至だ。

description: 日曜函館メイン大沼Sのワイドブリザード(セン5＝佐藤悠)は7戦ぶりにコンビを組む浜中を背に、函館ダートで強めに追われ、5F70秒4〜1F11秒6。上がり重点で伸ばした。 浜中は「しっかりゴール前はやりました。どちらかというと使って良くなる馬ですが(以前乗った時と)大きく変わってません。札幌(25年7月桑園特別1着)で勝っていて、函館も合うと思います。自分の競馬ができれば」と先行力に託した。

title_en: Update on Racetrack Fire Safety Review in New York
description: Following the devastating June 16 barn fire at Saratoga Casino Hotel, the New York State Gaming Commission is evaluating enhanced fire safety protocols and potential code changes to better protect horses housed at racetracks across the state.

title_en: Abashiri, Kensington Lane Imposing in Belmont Oaks
description: The Belmont Oaks (G1T), won four times by European-trained fillies in its last eight renewals, sees two invaders from across the Atlantic Ocean when the $600,000 race is renewed July 4 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: New Jersey Restores $10M Subsidy for Monmouth Park
description: After an initial proposed cut to $5 million, New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill signed off on a state budget that restored the annual purse subsidy to $10 million.

title_en: Old Friends Announces Annual HayRaiser Campaign
description: Committed to providing the highest standard of care for its beloved equine residents, Old Friends will launch their annual fundraiser to help cover the costs of quality hay and forage that help keep their horses healthy year-round.

title_en: Mikki Fight Scores Repeat Win In Teio Sho on Oi Dirt
description: Mikki Fight continued a remarkably consistent career at the top of Japan's dirt-racing ranks with a repeat victory July 1 at Oi Racecourse.

title_en: Madaket Road Among Entries for Fasig-Tipton HORA Sale
description: Fasig-Tipton released the initial catalog July 1 for its July Selected Horses of Racing Age Sale, being held July 14 in Lexington. The sale will immediately follow Fasig-Tipton's The July Sale of selected yearlings that same day.

title_en: FTC Upholds Trainer Serpe's Two-Year Suspension
description: The Federal Trade Commission upholds a suspension imposed on trainer Philip Serpe by the Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority.

title_en: Luminous Beauty May Shine in Spa's Schuylerville
description: A $40,000 buy could become a black-type earner July 3, opening day of the 46-day Saratoga Race Course meet, as Luminous Beauty tries to follow up an impressive maiden win in the $200,000 Schuylerville Stakes.

title_en: Resolute Thinking Big with Giant Sequoia, Goliath
description: Big-spending owner John Stewart believes the last week could mark a watershed moment for his Resolute Racing operation as he bids to establish it as a major new global force in racing.

title_en: Extreme Heat Causes Cancellations at Multiple Tracks
description: With severe heat forecast for July 3, Monmouth Park and Delaware Park cancel racing Friday.

title_en: Health Zone: Gut Health
description: The equine gut is an important but often delicate structure, especially when it comes to Thoroughbreds.

title_en: Jose Ortiz Voted Jockey of The Week
description: Highlighted by two graded stakes victories on Stephen Foster Day aboard Lagynos and Magnitude, Jose Ortiz earned Jockey of the Week honors for June 22-28.

title_en: TOBA July Member of the Month
description: Terri Wells grew up near to legendary horsewoman Mary Lou Whitney’s farm in Lexington, Ky. She and her husband, Dennis, went on to found Five Miles North Farm, so named because historical reports located the property five miles north of Lexington.

title_en: Exploring Clever Pedigrees of Miss Vyvyanne, Lagynos
description: The pedigree match is not unimportant, but numerous examples exist of a clever pedigree pattern upgrading a modest commercial background. Recent graded stakes winners Miss Vyvyanne and Lagynos are good examples.

title_en: Long Pour Tops Fasig-Titpon June Digital Sale at $190K
description: The Fasig-Tipton June Digital Sale closed June 30 with gross sales of $4,167,000 for 198 horses sold. The clearance rate was 80%.

title_en: Safety Summit Highlights Racehorse Data Revolution
description: Equine professionals at the forefront of health and performance technology deliver insightful presentations regarding objective equine-monitoring data during the June 30 Welfare and Safety of the Racehorse Summit at Keeneland.

title_en: $3.4 Million Yearling Purchase Faran Breaks His Maiden
description: On June 27, $3.4 million yearling purchase Faran broke his maiden at Los Alamitos Race Course, while $1.4 million 2-year-old purchase Tagermeen broke his at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Charles Town Lowers Takeout on Pick 3s, Daily Doubles
description: Hollywood Casino at Charles Town Races has announced it will lower the takeout on all Pick 3 and Daily Double wagers to 15%. The late Pick 3 minimum bet and wheel will increase to $3, and the late Daily Double minimum and wheel will increase to $5.

title_en: NTRA Update: What's Racing Through Washington
description: The Save America's Forgotten Equines Act has been garnering support and attention in recent months.

title_en: Gallop for Good Raises More Than $300,000 for Aftercare
description: The one-day online giving campaign, held June 27, generated more than 575 donations totaling more than $303,000 to benefit 75 Thoroughbred aftercare nonprofit organizations across the United States.

title_en: Magnitude Jumps to No.1 Spot in NTRA Rankings
description: Following an emphatic victory in last weekend's $1,998,000 Stephen Foster Stakes (G1) at Churchill Downs, Magnitude reclaimed the No. 1 spot in the June 30 NTRA Top Thoroughbred Poll.

title_en: 'Race to the NHC' Returns for Third Year
description: The "Race to the National Horseplayers Championship," a series of 25 free handicapping contests exclusively for subscribers of Race Lens, Equibase's interactive past performance product, is set to launch July 4 for the third year.

title_en: U.S. Owners Buy Into Unbeaten Juvenile Adonius
description: Rebecca Menzies is dreaming of Breeders' Cup glory as she plots the next step for Adonius after the exciting gelding was part-bought by the Virginia-based Riverdee and West Paces.

title_en: Bowman Named The Jockey Club Steward at NYRA Tracks
description: Trish Bowman has been named The Jockey Club steward for the New York Racing Association racetracks beginning July 1.

title_en: Several Tracks Postpone Cards Due to Heat
description: Ellis Park, Delaware Park, Horseshoe Indianapolis, and Colonial Downs have postponed their July 2 card and will move it in its entirety to July 6 because of extreme heat.

title_en: On the Rise: Elizabeth Talamo
description: In this latest installment of On the Rise, Elizabeth Talamo discusses her clothing line, Everywon Brand, promoting inclusivity in horse racing.

title_en: Into Mischief's Latest Milestone Adds to His Greatness
description: This edition of The List gives Spendthrift Farm's Into Mischief his flowers as the stallion joins an elite group of global greats.

title_en: Santa Anita Turf Undergoes Annual Renovation
description: The turf course at Santa Anita Park, the most widely used grass course in the country for Thoroughbred racing, has undergone its annual renovation, which includes approximately 10 acres of new sod to be laid atop the expansive racing surface.

title_en: Louisiana Levies Disciplinary Action Against Trainers
description: The Louisiana State Racing Commission issued major disciplinary actions against three trainers. Eduardo L. Morales received an immediate lifetime ban after an extensive cache of unauthorized contraband was found in his Delta Downs barn.

title_en: Hazlewood Caps Apprenticeship with Five Wins
description: Yedsit Hazlewood walked out of Laurel Park the evening of June 28 a journeyman jockey, having ridden his last race as an apprentice and ending a tumultuous 16 months.

title_en: BH Monday: Magnitude Conquers Foster, Goodbye Aqueduct
description: On the June 29 episode of BloodHorse Monday: Steve Asmussen reacts to Magnitude's Stephen Foster win, Run Fast Racing's Adam Kluger talks new ownership model and celebrity involvement, Sean Collins and Bob Ehalt react to Aqueduct's final day.

title_en: Delaware Park Cancels July 2-3 Cards Due to Heat
description: With high temperatures expected throughout the week, Delaware Park has canceled racing July 2-3 and adjusted post times on July 1 and 4.

title_en: Judge Seeks Higher Bid, Continued Racing at Hawthorne
description: The judge hearing the Hawthorne Race Course bankruptcy case has extended the deadline for bids for the track, hoping to maximize value and encourage bidders who want to continue racing.

title_en: First Horses Train on Belmont Park's New Tapeta Surface
description: The New York Racing Association unveiled the new Tapeta inner track at Belmont Park, which opened to horses June 29 to help usher in a new era for racing and training in the Empire State.

title_en: Rice, Franco Get Final Crowns at Aqueduct
description: Linda Rice and Manny Franco were the respective leaders of the trainer and jockey standings at the Belmont at the Big A spring/summer meet, completing a sweep of this year's meetings at Aqueduct as the leaders at the winter and spring meets as well.

title_en: Hinkle Farms' Success a Century in the Making
description: Giulio's Jewel, dam of Deterministic, is just one aspect of Hinkle Farms' success. The family-run venture has been in constant evolution since the land was purchased by Anne Archer Hinkle's great-grandfather in 1926.

title_en: Grade 1 Winner, Sire Channel Cat Sold to Turkey
description: Channel Cat is a freshman sire by multiple leading turf sire English Channel.

title_en: Double Diamond Homebred Sire Bahamian Squall Dies at 17
description: Donald Dizney, owner of Double Diamond Farm in Florida, bred and raced the son of Gone West. Bahamian Squall beat grade 1 winner Trinniberg in the 2013 Smile Sprint Handicap (G2) and ran second in the Alfred G. Vanderbilt Handicap (G1).

title_en: Antiope First Winner for Freshman Sire Jackie's Warrior
description: Antiope scores in her career debut June 26 at Colonial Downs, becoming the first winner for Spendthrift Farm's freshman sire Jackie's Warrior.

title_en: Mystic Guide Sires First Winner in South Korea
description: First-time starter Seraph won her debut by 7 lengths June 26 at Busan Racecourse.

title_en: BloodHorse.com Launches Maiden Watch Landing Page
description: BloodHorse.com has launched a Maiden Watch landing page that will allow our readers to quickly see the horses we have highlighted in the Maiden Watch column that appears in BloodHorse Daily.

title_en: Prominent North Carolina Breeder Shuford Dies at 79
description: Nancy Shuford was honored as North Carolina Breeder of the Year seven times between 2013 and 2025 by the Thoroughbred Owners and Breeders Association. She bred 13 black-type winners, including six graded stakes winners.

title_en: Flight Command Soars, First U.S. Winner for Flightline
description: Flight Command became the first American winner for Flightline in romping by 10 lengths in front-running fashion in the fifth race June 25 at Aqueduct Racetrack.

title_en: Ontario Commits CA$35M Annually to Equine Industry
description: The Ontario government is increasing support for agriculture and rural jobs across Ontario by contributing an additional CA$35 million annually for the next five years. About 80% goes to support Ontario's breeding sector and racing participants.

title_en: Belleza Latina, Lovely Em Head F-T June Digital Sale
description: Fasig-Tipton has cataloged 283 entries for its June Digital Sale. The five-day virtual sale will offer a diverse lineup of yearlings, racing or breeding prospects, and accomplished broodmares.

title_en: Two New Members Elected to MHBA Board of Directors
description: Three incumbents and two new members have been elected to the Maryland Horse Breeders Association board of directors. The election results were announced June 24.

title_en: Joliestar May Target July Cup, Return to Ascot in 2027
description: Joliestar is set to contest Newmarket's July Cup (G1) July 11 and to try Royal Ascot again next year after running a brave but agonizing third in the June 20 Queen Elizabeth II Jubilee Stakes (G1).

title_en: Sarayu Becomes First Winner for Sire Collusion Illusion
description: Sarayu breaks her maiden June 20 at Woodbine, becoming freshman sire Collusion Illusion's first winner.

title_en: Social Inclusion Returning to Pennsylvania for 2027
description: Social Inclusion, the grade 1-placed son of Pioneerof the Nile, is returning to Pennsylvania to stand stud in 2027. He will relocate to Bonner Hill Farms near Littlestown, Pa., said Bonner Hill Farms owner Cristina Holmes.

title_en: Coolmore Celebrates 'Iconic' Day for Justify at Ascot
description: Despite being a Triple Crown winner on dirt, Justify strengthened his résumé as a top stallion for European turf races June 18 at Royal Ascot with offspring taking the 2 1/2-mile Gold Cup Stakes (G1) and finishing 1-2 in the 7-furlong Chesham Stakes.

title_en: Kentucky-Bred Scandinavia Edges Trawlerman in Gold Cup
description: Kentucky-bred Scandinavia provided trainer Aidan O'Brien with his 100th winner at Royal Ascot by edging out defending winner Trawlerman in the final strides of a scintillating Gold Cup Stakes (G1) June 18 at Ascot Racecourse.

title_en: Bernick's Nola Soul Lands Royal Ascot's Chesham Stakes
